zh.Dedham, Massachusetts: 美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆
zh.Norwich, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦諾維其
zh.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Woodward Jr於大約1638年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆時，他的父親Peter Woodward Sr.36歲，母親Anna Ellen Cheney32歲。他於大約1667年與Mehitable Fisher在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆住了大約55年。他去世於1721年2月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年84歲。

zh-hans.Dedham, Massachusetts: 美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆

zh-hans.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Woodward Jr于大约1638年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆时，他的父亲Peter Woodward Sr.36岁，母亲Anna Ellen Cheney32岁。他于大约1667年与Mehitable Fisher在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆住了大约55年。他去世于1721年2月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Woodward Jr was born about 1638, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Peter Woodward Sr., was 36 and his mother, Anna Ellen Cheney, was 32. He married Mehitable Fisher about 1667, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States for about 55 years. He died on 15 February 1721, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Woodward Jr est né environ 1638, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Peter Woodward Sr., avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anna Ellen Cheney, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mehitable Fisher environ 1667, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis pendant environ 55 ans. Il est décédé le 15 février 1721, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans.

Er hat ungefähr 55 Jahre lang in Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 15. it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Woodward Jr è nato il circa 1638 nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Peter Woodward Sr., aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anna Ellen Cheney, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mehitable Fisher circa 1667, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 55 anni. Morì il 15 febbraio 1721, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.Dedham, Massachusetts: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクデドハム
ja.Norwich, New London, Connecticut Colony,: イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンノーウィチ
ja.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハム
ja.Dedham, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスデドハム
ja.lifeSummary: Peter Woodward Jrが約1638年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで生まれた時，父Peter Woodward Sr.は36歳，母Anna Ellen Cheneyは32歳であった。約1667年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムでMehitable Fisherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクデドハムに約55年間住んでいた。彼は1721年2月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで84歳で死去した。

ko.Norwich, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 노위치
ko.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함
ko.lifeSummary: Peter Woodward Jr(이)가 대략 1638년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Woodward Sr.(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Ellen Cheney(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1667년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 Mehitable Fisher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 데드함에서 약 55년 동안 살았다. 그는 1721년 2월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Woodward Jr nasceu aproximadamente 1638, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Peter Woodward Sr., tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anna Ellen Cheney, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mehitable Fisher aproximadamente 1667, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América por quase 55 anos. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1721, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 84 anos.

ru.Norwich, New London, Connecticut Colony,: норвич, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Woodward Jr родился около 1638 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Peter Woodward Sr. было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Ellen Cheney, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mehitable Fisher около 1667 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности дедхам, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты около 55 лет. Он умер 15 февраля 1721 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Woodward Jr nació aproximadamente 1638, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Peter Woodward Sr., tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anna Ellen Cheney, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mehitable Fisher aproximadamente 1667, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Dedham, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos durante unos 55 años. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1721, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años.
